report: Phase 13C.6 — Path A Core Calculator Growth Sprint Report
deploy_status: LIVE — all changes verified on production
executive_summary: 10/10 core calculators confirmed indexed. Applied CTR-optimized titles/metas to top 5 calculators. Added 20 internal authority links. Strengthened 5 tips and 1 example. Deployed and verified. All technical checks pass.

findings.common_weakness: Generic title pattern 'Name (2026) — Free Online Tool' used benefit-driven hook for CTR

mortgage-affordability.new: How Much House Can I Afford? Free Calculator (2026)

compound-interest.new: See Your Money Grow: Compound Interest Calculator (2026)

mortgage-calculator.new: Calculate Your Monthly Payment: Free Mortgage Calculator (2026)

loan-calculator.new: Plan Any Loan: Free Monthly Payment Calculator (2026)

retirement-planning.new: Will You Have Enough? Free Retirement Calculator (2026)

task_2_top5_improvements.meta_descriptions: All 5 get custom benefit-front-loaded meta descriptions with specific value props
task_2_top5_improvements.openGraph: All 5 get matching OG titles and descriptions

tips_added.compound-interest: +1 tip about 'time in the market' comparison
tips_added.mortgage-calculator: +1 tip about PMI avoidance at 20% down
tips_added.loan-calculator: +1 tip about comparing total cost vs monthly payment

task_2_top5_improvements.example_strengthened: mortgage-affordability example now shows concrete $325,000 result from $6,000/month scenario
task_2_top5_improvements.technical: Backward-compatible: non-top-5 slugs fall through to original generic pattern via nullish coalescing (??)

breakdown.note: Added decision links to v10 and main files

task_4_query_page_matching.status: Updated — 10 calculator hubs matched against top GSC queries
task_4_query_page_matching.action: All calculator queries match the correct calculator pages. No redirects needed.

task_5_ctr_rescue.status: Updated — applied to calculator-related pages with GSC impressions
task_5_ctr_rescue.note: Targeted blog posts and guide pages with impressions > 0, clicks = 0, CTR < 1%

task_6_position_boosts.status: Updated — applied to pages supporting calculator rankings
task_6_position_boosts.note: Strengthened blog posts, guides, and decision pages that link to core calculators

task_7_technical_validation.verification_method: Live curl checks against production URLs

task_8_pinterest_monitor.performance_data: Too early — posted <24h ago. First meaningful analytics ~June 5

biggest_blocker: None — core calculators confirmed indexed, CTR titles live, authority links added. Next sprint: monitor ranking movement over 3-7 days.
recommended_next_sprint_actions: Monitor GSC impressions + position for top 5 calculators (check in 48h)
If CTR improvement shows: extend benefit-driven titles to remaining 5 calculators
If impressions increase: strengthen intro content above calculator widgets
Consider adding structured data (WebApplication schema) to calculator pages
Continue daily CTR rescue + position boost cadence (5+3 per day)
